title: Hauser (disambiguation)
content:
Hauser may refer to:
*[[Howzer]], the [[Canon]] [[Clone Captain]] and eventually [[stormtrooper]] [[captain]]
*[[Lynch Hauser]], the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] [[Galactic Empire|Imperial]] [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]]
*[[Jens Hausser]], the real life model for some of [[Mike Jackson]]'s illustrations in [[West End Games]] reference books

{{Disambig}}
